text:
why are people still paying aws prices for gpus

there's marketplaces where datacenters rent out idle gpus at market rate

vast .ai is the main one. same A100 that's $4/hr on aws is 50 cents here.

use cases:

- train your own models instead of paying openai per token
- run local

The opportunity with AI slideshows is slept on massively 

If I was starting again I’d just have a farm of slideshow accounts running on RPM deal 

You’d definitely make more if you pushed your traffic to an affiliate offer but getting paid retainer + RPM is motivating

The amount of kids that are going to be making $5k - $10k a month from posting content for brands is going to be insane this year 

there is already people who make 6 figs a year by posting fully AI generated content working probably 2 hours a day 

Jobs will be pointless

handwritten letters in a physical mailbox are a cheatcode compared to traditional cold outreach

because who tf still sends "mail" in the big 26

here's why this old-school tactic will make you print 10x more than spamming emails:

physical mail stands out completely because

deadass should be gatekeeping stuff like this

but i know NO ONE on twitter implements a thing

so it's safe to give away secrets that printed me 6-figs

you can be the exception tho and don't just bookmark it like usual:
